query: SELECT DATE(transactionDate) as date, ticker, shares, CAST(totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as amount_chf FROM portfolioTransactions WHERE portfolioId = 90001 AND transactionType = 'buy' AND DATE(transactionDate) > '2025-10-29' ORDER BY transactionDate
